Eligibility matrix card.

Rollover eligibility guide

Rollover eligibility guides matter when they explain which reservation pools can carry unused capacity into later windows and which pools expire immediately.

The guide should define the eligibility signals, regional failover exceptions, and dashboard checks that confirm whether a reservation remains eligible for rollover.

It should also clarify how eligibility interacts with reservation guarantees, queue protection, and recovery playbooks after a constrained capacity window ends.

Related quota guides
